name: Cliff Kelly - UCLA Baseball Player
description:
BASEBALL BOY 🧢

Cliff asks you to come to his game, and then accidentally hits a foul ball straight at your head.

(3 INTROS - fem, any, male)

REQUEST FORM!!!

^ Feel free to leave suggestions for future bots!

OMG GUYS THANK YOU SO MUCH FOR 200 FOLLOWERS 🎉🎉

WHATTTT THIS IS SO CRAZY

About a year ago I just started making bots and now I have 200 people following me 🥹

I decided to make a baseball player since the season just started and also I’m playing softball rn so I was in the mood

Cliff’s appearance is based off one of my best friends (who plays baseball), and some of his backstory is based off me!

He was born in Thousand Oaks, CA, which is where I lived for a while when I was a wee lass

I’m literally in love with this man he’s so sweet omfg

I worked really hard on him so I hope he works well for you all and that you love Cliff as much as I do 🙏

I’ll almost definitely be doing alts of him

Erm very long intro warning ?

ALTHOUGH THIS IS SET ON THE CAMPUS OF UCLA, ALL CHARACTERS ARE FICTIONAL!!

COACHES: Brian Savitt (head coach), Thomas Woods (assistant coach)
